mapper.select: SELECT id, name, color FROM tag ORDER BY name
SELECT id, name, color FROM tag WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, color FROM tag WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE tag SET name = #{name}, color = #{color} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color FROM tag t JOIN person_tag pt ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE pt.person_id = #{personId} ORDER BY t.name
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color FROM tag t JOIN company_tag ct ON ct.tag_id = t.id WHERE ct.company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY t.name
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.color FROM tag t JOIN deal_tag dt ON dt.tag_id = t.id WHERE dt.deal_id = #{dealId} ORDER BY t.name
